control.description-key: Embeds the Wacom STU-540 signature capture page (hosted on Azure Static Web Apps) inside a Canvas App and surfaces the captured signature as outputs.

property.name: IframeUrl
property.description-key: Full HTTPS URL of the deployed capture.html (e.g. https://wacom-capture.azurestaticapps.net/capture.html)

property.name: SignerName
property.description-key: Name of the person signing (sent to the capture page as ?signer=)

property.name: Reason
property.description-key: Why the document is being signed (sent as ?reason=)

property.name: Location
property.description-key: Where the signature is being captured (sent as ?location=)

property.name: License
property.description-key: (Optional) Wacom Signature SDK runtime license string. Empty = fallback (non-biometric) mode.

property.name: AutoStart
property.description-key: If true, capture starts automatically when the iframe loads.

property.name: Command
property.description-key: Set to start, cancel, clear or submit to drive the capture from Power Fx. Resets to empty after dispatch.

property.name: Status
property.description-key: Current status: Loading / Ready / Capturing / Captured / Cancelled / Error

property.name: ImageDataUrl
property.description-key: Captured signature as a data URL (data:image/png;base64,...). Bind directly to Image.Image.

property.name: ImageBase64
property.description-key: Captured signature as plain base64 PNG (no data URL prefix).

property.name: SigObjBase64
property.description-key: Wacom SigObj blob (base64). In fallback mode this is a tagged JSON envelope.

property.name: StrokeCount
property.description-key: Number of strokes in the captured signature.

property.name: CapturedAtUtc
property.description-key: Timestamp when the capture was completed.

property.name: LastError
property.description-key: Error message from the most recent failed capture (empty on success).
